# Existing Site Analysis Contract

## Required Inputs

- current URL or local project path;
- source access mode: local, public URL, screenshot, authenticated, analytics export;
- target business goal;
- planned action if known: improve, redesign, rebuild, migrate;
- approval status for network, crawling, authenticated access, and private exports.

## Evidence Groups

- page inventory;
- templates/components;
- content and IA;
- SEO/LLM surface: titles, headings, metadata, schema, robots, sitemap, llms.txt when present;
- UX/conversion issues;
- performance or implementation constraints when evidence exists;
- asset inventory;
- migration risk notes.

## Non-Goals

This skill does not choose final strategy, rewrite the site, or change live settings. It prepares evidence for decisioning.
